highlights.text: Yesterday, we broke the 2 day structure down and I wrote at Wednesday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins on the failure of 5998….I’d look short below the lows of that bounce.
As I’ve said for days because of how substantial this rally has been we could easily pullback 100, or 200 or even 300 points and it wouldn’t hurt the bull case at all.
I’d see a pullback all the way down to 5886 or so as being very healthy and it wouldn’t harm the broad bull case in any way shape or form” Today, we got down to 5886.
This is a rare setup type, and its entire purpose is to filter the real breakdowns out from the traps/Failed Breakdowns.

post_title: Largest Red Week Since September 3rd For SPX. Buyable Dip, or More Red Ahead? November 18th Plan
